component.name: @trelyan/pq-sdk
component.description: TRELYAN post-quantum SDK (reference, UNAUDITED). Built only on the widely-reviewed @noble pure-JS crypto.

properties.name: trelyan:audit_status
properties.value: UNAUDITED reference; third-party crypto/side-channel audit pending

properties.name: trelyan:runtime
properties.value: Node.js >=18 (tested on v24.16.0); pure-JS, no native addons

properties.name: trelyan:note
properties.value: package-lock.json (committed) is authoritative. Top-level @noble/hashes resolves to 1.8.0; @noble/hashes 2.2.0 resolves NESTED under @noble/curves and @noble/post-quantum (each bundles its own copy via npm), so there is no conflict at any single resolution point. Run `npm ci` to reproduce this exact tree.

components.name: post-quantum
components.description: ML-KEM (FIPS 203), ML-DSA (FIPS 204), SLH-DSA (FIPS 205), Falcon — pure JS

components.name: hashes
components.description: SHA-2/SHA-3/SHAKE/HKDF/HMAC — pure JS (transitive; nested under @noble/curves and @noble/post-quantum)

components.name: curves
components.description: X25519, Ed25519 (classical hybrid legs) — pure JS
